zh.Missenden, Buckingham, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾米森登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden於1376年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登時，他的父親Sir Edmund de Missenden34歲，母親Juliana Grey27歲。他於1407年與Lady Isabell Frome在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年8月28日享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Missenden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fishenden
meanings: English: locative name from the lost place-name Festinden in Hawkhurst (Kent), recorded as Festendenn about 1270.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden was born in 1376, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edmund de Missenden, was 34 and his mother, Juliana Grey, was 27. He married Lady Isabell Frome in 1407, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 28 August 1409, at the age of 33, and was buried in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden est né en 1376, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund de Missenden, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Juliana Grey, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabell Frome en 1407, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 août 1409, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1407 in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Isabell Frome geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Lui sposato Lady Isabell Frome nel 1407, nel Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missendenが1376年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund de Missendenは34歳，母Juliana Greyは27歳であった。1407年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムでLady Isabell Fromeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年8月28日に33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden(이)가 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund de Missenden(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Grey(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 Lady Isabell Frome(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 8월 28일 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Isabell Frome em 1407, em Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden родился в 1376 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund de Missenden было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Grey, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabell Frome в 1407 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 28 августа 1409 г. в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Isabell Frome en 1407, en Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1409, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
